retrieved_result: OP Careers Orthotics and Prosthetics: Make a Career of Making a DifferenceHome What is O&P? O&P Professionals O&P Education Contact Us HOPE Careers Consortium The Orthotics, Prosthetics & Pedorthics (HOPE) Careers Consortium is building exciting new programs that provide valuable career education and training in orthotics, prosthetics, and pedorthics. For information on a member school, visit O&P Technician Programs below. Learn Mo
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses orthotics and prosthetics careers, not database query optimization.
